description_long: This is a modern, multi-level house built on a sloped terrain, featuring a combination of flat and gently sloped roof sections. The structure is composed of clean, angular lines with large glass windows wrapping around the main living areas, providing expansive views and natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a mix of light-colored materials, likely stucco or concrete, with some sections featuring wood or brick accents. A prominent driveway leads to a covered carport or garage area, and there is a visible outdoor terrace or patio space adjacent to a swimming pool. The landscaping is minimal, with the house integrated into the green slope, and retaining walls supporting the elevated sections. The overall design emphasizes open, functional spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a terrace with a pool, built into a sloped green landscape. The design features clean lines, light exterior finishes, and a prominent driveway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the sloped terrain, the main roofline, and the rear section of the house, with the driveway and carport visible on the left.
description_view_1: This angle shows the front facade, main entryway, large windows, and the outdoor terrace with the pool, as well as the driveway curving up to the house.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the house's integration with the slope, the main living area with large windows, and the pool area in the foreground.
description_view_3: This rear view displays the back of the house, the retaining wall, and the pool area, with less visibility of the main entry and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered approach with a wide driveway, steps leading to a recessed door, and minimal decorative elements.
